lesson.menu_desc: Frequency adverbs -- always, sometimes, never -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 19 -- Social Media -- Frequency Adverbs (A1)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 19 -- Social Media

listenings.text: Hi, this is Estephano. I am a tech student, so I use social media every day. In the morning, I always check my account. I usually like the photos from my friends. I often follow new tech pages, because I love technology. I sometimes post a photo of my projects, but I am a little shy. I never share my address or my phone number online, because safety is important. In the evening, I usually answer the comments on my page. Social media is fun, but I always try to use it in a smart way!

Hello, this is Sara from the Tech Club. I call about our new social media class. Here are three quick tips. First, always think before you post a photo. Second, never share your password or your home address. Third, you usually get many notifications, so check them once or twice a day, not every minute. Remember: a good profile is safe and friendly. Thank you, and see you in class!

extra_audio.text: Estephano starts his day online. First, he opens the app and checks his account. Then he reads the new notifications. Next, he likes the photos from his friends. After that, he follows a new tech page. Finally, he posts a photo of his project and answers the comments.
